# Pore Network Modeling

**Summary**: A method to model the geometry and connectivity of pores in a rock.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025]] applied pore-network-modeling to quantify pore size distribution and connectivity.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Pore network modeling was used to calculate parameters like volume, surface area, and equivalent diameter for different pore types. ([[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025, p. 23]])
